src/main/java/com/idealo/CheckoutApplica.general_idea: Remove deprecated Springfox Swagger 2 annotation and import as part of the migration to Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/idealo/CheckoutApplica.why_exists: The 'springfox' library is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace) and will cause runtime failures or classpath conflicts; the annotation is no longer valid in the new ecosystem.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/api/Ba.general_idea: Replace deprecated javax.validation imports with Jakarta EE equivalents required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/api/Ba.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist'.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/api/Ba.general_idea: Remove unused import for RequestMethod since it is no longer used after switching to @PostMapping.
Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor as Spring Boot infers constructor injection when there is only one constructor.
Remove unused import for @Autowired since the annotation was removed from the constructor.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/facade.general_idea: Remove redundant @Autowired annotation from constructor injection.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/item/I.general_idea: Remove @Autowired annotation from constructor to rely on Spring's implicit single-constructor injection.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/item/d.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation.Nullable import to jakarta.annotation.Nullable for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/item/d.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile without the jakarta replacement.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/item/d.general_idea: Migrate javax.validation.constraints.NotNull import to jakarta.validation.constraints.NotNull for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/item/d.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile without the jakarta replacement.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Bas.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Bas.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error 'package javax.validation.constraints does not exist'.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Ite.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation.Nullable import to jakarta.annotation.Nullable for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Ite.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 11+ and Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE namespaces; code will fail to compile or link without the Jakarta equivalent.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Ite.general_idea: Migrate javax.validation.constraints.NotNull import to jakarta.validation.constraints.NotNull for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Ite.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Java 11+ and Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE namespaces; code will fail to compile or link without the Jakarta equivalent.

src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Spe.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/com/idealo/checkout/vo/Spe.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ require the jakarta.* namespace; using javax.validation will result in ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors if the javax package is not present on the classpath.

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Comment out the deprecated 'features' property for embedded MongoDB as it is no longer supported in newer versions.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.after:
# This property is deprecated: Feature support has been removed from Embedded Mongo. A custom MongodConfig bean should be defined instead.
# features: SYNC_DELAY

src/test/java/com/idealo/InitializationT.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 imports and annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support Spring Boot 3.x testing requirements.
src/test/java/com/idealo/InitializationT.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 runner classes and annotations are incompatible or removed in the new test context hierarchy.

src/test/java/com/idealo/InitializationT.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 static assertion method with JUnit 5/Hamcrest static import for compatibility.
src/test/java/com/idealo/InitializationT.why_exists: org.junit.Assert is part of JUnit 4 and is not available or compatible with the JUnit 5 platform used by Spring Boot 3.

src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.general_idea: Migrate test runner from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 by replacing the @RunWith annotation with @ExtendWith.
src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner classes are not recognized by the JUnit 5 platform; tests will fail to execute or be discovered without the JUnit 5 extension.

src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle annotation @Before with JUnit 5 @BeforeEach.
src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.why_exists: JUnit 5 does not recognize the JUnit 4 @Before annotation; setup methods will not be executed before tests.

src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 test annotation @Test with JUnit 5 @Test.
src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.why_exists: JUnit 5 does not recognize the JUnit 4 @Test annotation; test methods will not be discovered or executed.

src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.general_idea: Update imports to use JUnit 5 API classes instead of JUnit 4.
src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes are removed or incompatible in a pure JUnit 5 environment; compilation fails if old imports are retained.

src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.general_idea: Update Spring Test context runner import to use the JUnit 5 compatible extension.
src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.why_exists: SpringJUnit4ClassRunner is specific to JUnit 4; it is incompatible with the JUnit 5 platform used by Spring Boot 3.

src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 static import for assertThat with JUnit 5/Hamcrest static import.
src/test/java/com/idealo/IntegrationTest.why_exists: org.junit.Assert.assertThat is part of JUnit 4; it may not be available or preferred in a JUnit 5 migration context.
